text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: This is a real, widely-cited GitHub repository released in 2023 by Rohan Taori, Ishaan Gulrajani, Tianyi Zhang, Yann Dubois, Xuechen Li, Carlos Guestrin, Percy Liang, and Tatsunori B. Hashimoto — exactly matching the cited authors. The title "Stanford Alpaca: An Instruction-following LLaMA model" and this author list appear consistently in the official BibTeX entry across numerous sources. The automated checker flagged a mismatch only because the GitHub repo's display name differs from the informal citation title, which is a metadata extraction issue, not hallucination.
LINK: https://github.com/tatsu-lab/stanford_alpaca
